title: Google Finance Search Scraper
description: Search Google Finance for ticker and finance instrument discovery. Use queries for batch mode, or q for single-query compatibility.

q.title: Query
q.description: Single ticker, company, ETF, index, fund, or finance instrument search query. Ignored when queries is provided.

queries.title: Queries
queries.description: Batch of up to 25 Google Finance search queries processed in one Actor run. One dataset item is written per matched result.

hl.title: Language
hl.description: Google Finance language code, such as en, de, es, or zh-cn.

gl.title: Country
gl.description: Country code, such as us, gb, de, or ca.
